content:
Member-only story

Artificial Intelligence can now preserve your voice your words and your personality. The question is not whether it can do this. It is whether it should do this.

6 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Your Ai is always aluve — Photo by Gerax Sotelo on UnsplashI was awake three nights ago. So I did something I had not done in years. I opened a laptop clicked through a lot of old folders and found a bunch of voice messages from my father. There were forty-seven of them. Some were ordinary. "Pick up milk on your way " Others were softer. He would call just to say my name in that way he had half song, half anchor.
I sat there in the dark my thumb hovering over the play button and a thought came to me that was so strong I had to set the phone down.
If I died tonight all of these things. Every recording, every text, every finished email. Would still be there tomorrow. Not in a sense. Literally. Someone could take those forty-seven messages put them into an Artificial Intelligence voice cloner and make new sentences in my fathers voice that he never said. This would be a kind of pain made from love.
This is not something that might happen in the future. It is something that is happening now in 2026. Most families have not…
